title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
